channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Advocates warn of wide-ranging implications of US Supreme Court TPS ruling
item.description: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haiti and Syria, threatening family separation say advocates.

item.title: Rescuers race to find survivors of Venezuelan earthquakes
item.description: Rescue teams in Venezuela are racing to find earthquake survivors as the critical 72-hour "golden window" nears.

item.title: Israeli prosecutors charge six settlers after West Bank mosque attack
item.description: Israeli attacks on Palestinian villages have increased in the occupied West Bank, even as settlers charged.

item.title: Why did these World Cup ads strike a nerve in Egypt?
item.description: A viral World Cup campaign tapped into a familiar conversation among Egyptian football fans, prompting debate.

item.title: US announces framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has announced the deal after talks unfolded in Washington, DC.

item.title: Nine people killed in building collapse in Lagos, Nigeria
item.description: Twenty seven people were rescued with injuries of varying severity; governor orders safety checks on surrounding area.

item.title: New York City freezes rents for one million regulated apartments
item.description: New York City's rent freeze fulfillls a key campaign promise from Mayor Zohran Mamdani

item.title: DR Congo files case against Rwanda at ICJ over decades of alleged ‘abuses’
item.description: Kinshasa takes Kigali to UN's top court over 30 years of alleged massacres, sexual violence, and forced displacement.

item.title: How did Colombia’s election split a nation in two?
item.description: Colombia elected its first right-wing president in years by a razor-thin margin.

item.title: ‘This time’: The World Cup commercials capturing Egypt’s soaring hopes
item.description: The advertisements play on Egypt's poor World Cup record — and the belief that 2026 is different. So far, they ring true

item.title: Hezbollah: Israel must ‘unconditionally’ leave Lebanon
item.description: Hezbollah says Israel has "no option" but to “unconditionally” withdraw from southern Lebanon and other occupied areas.

item.title: Why did these World Cup ads strike a nerve in Egypt?
item.description: Why did these World Cup ads strike a nerve in Egypt?

item.title: Norway vs France LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow live updates from the blockbuster clash in Group I - including the build-up, analysis and live text commentary.

item.title: EU targets Somalia with visa curbs as president pushes back on returns
item.description: President says his country will readmit genuine nationals but insists Europe must first verify deportees' identities.

item.title: Why has the UN paused plans to evacuate sailors from the Strait of Hormuz?
item.description: A cargo vessel had been struck by a projectile near Oman, as Iran says all ships must pass with its permission.

item.title: Morocco jails 29, including politicians and sports figures, in drug trial
item.description: Casablanca court delivers landmark verdict in 'Escobar of the Sahara' case: up to 12 years for top figures.

item.title: Ex-Trump adviser Bolton pleads guilty in classified documents case
item.description: Hawkish national security figure has emerged as critic of President Trump after serving during his first term in office.

item.title: Iran slams the GCC and the US for ‘interventionist’ statement: What we know
item.description: Tehran rejects US-GCC pressure over missiles, the Strait of Hormuz and regional armed groups.

item.title: South Korean court jails former first lady for seven years in bribery case
item.description: Kim Keon Hee was sentenced for taking bribes including luxury items in return for political favours.

item.title: Iraq’s new PM launches anticorruption campaign, but is it enough?
item.description: Al-Zaidi campaign to combat corruption seizes $86m, properties, vehicles and gold. But analysts say he needs to do more.

item.title: New York’s primaries signal a new force in US politics
item.description: Progressive, Muslim and Arab American candidates are challenging old limits on debate over Israel and Palestine.

item.title: Aid groups urge swift action to avert ‘atrocities’ in Sudan’s el-Obeid
item.description: The city is at risk of an 'imminent ground offensive' by the RSF paramilitary and its allies, 38 NGOs warn.

item.title: Hezbollah demands Israel leave Lebanon ‘unconditionally’ amid talks in US
item.description: As Lebanon-Israel reach an agreement, Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem accepts 'no normalisation' and 'no gains for Israel'

item.title: Thermal cameras reveal intense heat for outdoor workers in Europe
item.description: Thermal cameras reveal intense heat for outdoor workers in Europe

item.title: Everything we know so far about the deadly earthquakes in Venezuela
item.description: Everything we know so far about the deadly earthquakes in Venezuela
